title: fix: Fix parameter mismatch in EPUBBookLoaderHelper.translate_with_backoff
body:
Root cause: translate_with_backoff was defined to accept only keyword arguments but was invoked with positional arguments (text, context_flag) elsewhere in the code, causing a TypeError: translate_with_backoff() takes 1 positional argument but 3 were given.

Change overview:
- Update EPUBBookLoaderHelper.translate_with_backoff signature to explicitly accept the parameters passed by callers (text and context_flag) as positional arguments, and forward them as named arguments to the underlying translator.
- Add jitter=None to the backoff decorator to align with desired backoff behavior and ensure deterministic testing where needed.
- Preserve existing retry logging behavior (on_backoff and on_giveup) and improve error handling by clearly propagating the parameters to translate.

Impact:
- The method now correctly handles calls like translate_with_backoff(p.text, self.context_flag) without raising TypeError.
- Backoff behavior remains intact with added configurability and improved traceability.

Notes:
- No public API changes beyond fixing argument handling; existing internal calls using positional arguments will continue to work.
- Consider reviewing any external callers that might have used keyword-only calls to ensure compatibility, though the new signature supports positional args as used in code.

step_plan.summary: Patch EPUBBookLoaderHelper.translate_with_backoff to correctly handle positional arguments by redefining its signature and forwarding to the translator with keyword arguments, and add jitter=None to the backoff decorator for deterministic/backoff behavior.

steps.operation: Refactor translate_with_backoff to accept explicit positional parameters (text, context_flag) and forward to translator as keyword args; update to include jitter=None on the backoff decorator
steps.reason: To fix TypeError from parameter mismatch when callers pass positional args (text, context_flag) and ensure the translator receives correctly named arguments; also align backoff behavior for deterministic testing
steps.side_effects: Call sites that pass positional arguments will continue to work; potential need to review any keyword-only call sites; backoff configuration now deterministic due to jitter=None; may affect test timing and logs
